All personal repos:

---

🧠 AI, Machine Learning & Agents

• js-genai – SDK for Gemini and Vertex AI
• terminal-ai – AI in the shell, supports multiple models
• aionui – GUI app for Gemini CLI
• maxmsp_ai – Deep ML models in MaxMSP
• DeepCode – Open Agentic Coding (Paper2Code, Text2Web, etc.)
• Intelligent-Agent-for-Microsoft-365-Automation – AI agent for Microsoft 365 automation
• anthropic-cookbook – Recipes for Claude
• xai-cookbook – Examples for XAI’s Grok APIs
• awesome-ai-agents – Curated list of autonomous AI agents
• stable-diffusion – Text‑to‑image diffusion model


---

📚 Cookbooks, Tutorials & Learning Resources

• openai-cookbook – Guides for OpenAI API
• adaptiveDEVIearningHub – GitHub Desktop tutorial repo
• desktop-tutorial – GitHub Desktop tutorial repo
• rr-organization1 – Reproducible Science Curriculum lesson
• obsidian-help – Help docs for Obsidian
